ext.description: Observability for AI workflows: open the interactive timeline of a session (Claude Code, NDJSON, OpenTelemetry-GenAI, Cursor, Codex) in a VS Code window, with segments to review and a save option.
cmd.sessions.title: Sessions (list + aggregates)
cmd.openFile.title: Visualize file (NDJSON/OTel/Cursor/Codex)
cmd.liveSession.title: Watch session live (refreshes on change)
config.tokens.turnBudget: Fresh tokens (input+output) per turn above which the turn is flagged as expensive.
config.tokens.agentBudget: Total tokens of a sub-agent above which it is flagged as expensive.
config.durationMs.tool: Milliseconds above which a tool is flagged as slow.
config.durationMs.agent: Milliseconds above which a sub-agent is flagged as slow.
config.baseline.sigma: Standard deviations above the agent's historical mean to flag it as an outlier.
